title: realism blend 256x
description: Minecraft texture pack that combines realistic textures with default textures.
body:
# Realism blend 256x version

## Description and purpose
A texture pack for Minecraft which has the purpose to upgrade the default textures for the most blocks while still retaining some vanilla textures. The texture pack was made through photos with permissive licenses. Medium quality: 256x256 textures (medium downscale).

### How to enable the texture pack
If in the main menu click options, resource packs, and then go over available to select the resource pack and load it by clicking the arrow pointing right. You can unload the resource pack by going over selected and pressing the arrow pointing to left. Also in order to actually work be careful because in available the priority system is a top down one, thus you should press the small lateral arrows to move the texture pack on top and always on top of default to actually apply the new textures.
